Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Complaint To Substitute True Name Of Doe Defendant
Off Calendar Feb-14-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF YUE LIU's Motion To Amend Complaint To Substitute True Name Of Doe Defendant.

Plaintiff Yue Liu's motion to amend complaint to substitute true name of Doe Defendant is granted. No opposition filed.

Order is signed.(see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-26-2017 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.

Defendant City and County of San Francisco's demurrer to the second cause of action in the complaint filed by plaintiff Yue Liu is sustained without leave to amend.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, email:rhunter@sftc.org, Reported. (D302)
